message.content:
@startuml
participant "SalesClerk" as SalesClerk
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI" as ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController" as ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController
participant "ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService
participant "OrderRepository" as OrderRepository
participant "ChangeToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeToBeingDeliveredService

participant "SalesClerk" as Actor

Actor --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to "Being delivered" for customer delivery.
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 2 orderDispatched()
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController --> ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService : 3 orderDispatched()
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService --> OrderRepository : 4 orderDispatched()
OrderRepository --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 5 ordersDispatched
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI --> Actor : 6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched.
Actor --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 7 Asks to choose one of the orders
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 8 Selects the order he wants to change status
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController --> ChangeToBeingDeliveredService : 9 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeToBeingDeliveredService --> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 10 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController --> OrderRepository : 11 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
OrderRepository --> ChangeToBeingDeliveredService : 12 Successful change
ChangeToBeingDeliveredService --> Actor : 13 Informs that is changed

@enduml
